metadata.title: Claudebin - Your Claude Code Sessions Deserve a URL
metadata.description: Turn your Claude Code sessions into shareable, embeddable, and continuable artifacts.

commands.oneClickInstall:
claude plugin marketplace add wunderlabs-dev/claudebin
claude plugin install claudebin@claudebin-marketplace

home.headline:
Your Claude sessions
<gradient>deserve a URL</gradient>
home.description: Turn your Claude sessions into shareable, embeddable, and continuable artifacts.

notFound.title: Page <gradient>not found</gradient>
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

profile.notFoundDescription: The profile you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

user.shareGuideTitle: How to share your first conversation?
user.dangerZoneDescription: Deleting your account will disconnect your CLI token from Claudebin. Your published threads will remain public. This action cannot be undone.
user.deleteAccountError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

threads.title:
<gradient>Conversations</gradient>
Threads
threads.description: Browse and search through all Claude conversations
threads.searchPlaceholder: Search for a thread, build, optimization,...
threads.emptyDescription: Check for typos or try different keywords.
threads.noThreadsDescription: Threads will appear here once they are published.

thread.continueDescription: Run this command in your terminal to continue with Claude
thread.embedHint: Click on any two messages in the conversation to select the range you want to embed.
thread.notFoundDescription: The thread you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

login.title:
<gradient>Authenticate</gradient>
to Claudebin
login.description: Sign in to publish and manage your sessions
login.errorDescription: Something went wrong during sign in. Please try again.

cliAuth.title:
<gradient>CLI</gradient>
Authentication
cliAuth.description: Securely connect your terminal to Claudebin
cliAuth.successDescription: Your terminal is now connected to Claudebin. You can close this window and return to your terminal.
cliAuth.invalidLinkDescription: This authentication link is missing the required code. Please use the link provided in your terminal.
cliAuth.invalidCodeDescription: This authentication code doesn't exist or has already been used. Please run the auth command again.
cliAuth.expiredDescription: This authentication code has expired. Please run the auth command again to get a new link.
cliAuth.failedDescription: Something went wrong while connecting your terminal. Please try again.

footer.copyright: © {year} Claudebin created by <link>Wunderlabs</link>. All rights reserved.
